channel.title: Comments for page "The News Tonight: Wednesday April 26th 2017"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "The News Tonight: Wednesday April 26th 2017"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
While I feel like the exposition dump after the radio broadcast could be changed, this was a very entertaining read (which definitely does not include a bias towards one of the central parts of the tale).

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: So the guy listens to a batshit crazy radio broadcast, and then he's like, "Wow, that was batshit crazy, and here are all the reasons why." Spending the second half of your story explaining the first is not a good use of your time. And then the guy just dies for no apparent reason, and I've got no reason to care about him. He was on screen for like two minutes. I think this needs to be reapproached.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: You shouldn't have a colon in the URL. It renders the article invisible in the Recently Created Pages. Do change it via the 'Rename' function.
